calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Colorquick, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 15, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Tim Wiley was filed on April 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 15, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Colorquick, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $57,663.85.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,390.40.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $515.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $62,069.25.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
